repositories.name: Cast Metadata & TV Controls
repositories.description: Local-first unified TV/Cast controller with one Home Assistant device per physical TV, automatic discovery, a first-class duplicate-device merge wizard, advanced native-source grouping, persistent identity, capability routing, dynamic metadata, managed apps and inputs, activities, Wake-on-LAN, diagnostics, Repairs, transition events and opt-in positive-detection YouTube ad skipping. Version 8.1.0 adds full hardware-evidence matching and registry reconciliation so stale controller devices and disabled metadata entities are consolidated correctly.

repositories.name: Unified TV Card
repositories.description: Container-responsive TV controller card with grouped dynamic TV/Cast app selection, a separate input selector, managed favourites, activities, mute beside volume, playback, remote controls, artwork, diagnostics and auto-discovered YouTube ad-skip controls. Version 1.2.1 verifies V8 compatibility and adds self-healing full GitHub releases for reliable HACS update discovery.
